message:
feat(python): numpy.tile wrapper parity (franken_numpy-2w7o)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.tile(A, reps) so array
repetition matches numpy across scalar reps, tuple reps, 1-D and
2-D inputs, reps=0 producing empty output, dtype preservation,
and large reps factors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
